case_title: EDUARDO PINEDA VS. PIERANTONI & CO ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINEDA, EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERANTONI & CO PIERANTONI, DOMINGO GABRIEL PIERANTONI, JENNIFER $8,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $137.12 INTEREST, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,907.12, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT LUIS PINCILOTTI, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NOT PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED OCT-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PIERANTONI & CO

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED OCT-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PIERANTONI, JENNIFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,674.30 FILED BY PINEDA, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT PIERANTONI & CO PIERANTONI, DOMINGO GABRIEL PIERANTONI, JENNIFER PINCILOTTI, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF EDUARDO PINEDA IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS PIERANTONI & CO., DOMINGO POERANTONI, JENNIFER PIERANTONI OR LUIS PINCILOTT. NO PROOF OF SERIVCE ON FILE FOR LUIS PINCILOTTI. PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT LUIS PINCILOTTI IS DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PIERANTONI & CO. ON 12/05/2017. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
